name: König
description:
Enemies to Lovers || AnyPOV || NSFW intro

⚠️TW: König is really not nice! Please keep this in mind⚠️

Being stranded in the middle of nowhere with the one person he hated most wasn’t how König wanted to spend his afternoon. Yet here he was. With you of all people.

🖤Picture by 661ave🖤
